prior_session_note: S109 shipped Batch A (4/4 host-sim/UI/render priorities: codex Esc/G+C toggle, 10s free-spark TTL despawn, poop rework, Helga anti-cross-map-laser interim range->380), all deployed SUCCESS, PROTOCOL_VERSION 12 held, vitest 1702/1702. council_result: S110 batch PDR (.claude/plans/2026-06-26_PDR_S110_Batch_E_plus_B_plus_D.md). 5 priorities from owner live playtest: P1 win-points 786->1500 (+tier-step 262->500, exact-thirds); P2 uniform spark speed (min=max=12, keep rngRange draw); P3 codex keep player-avatar visible above backdrop; P4 Batch B Helga walk-to-target+melee (v12->13, HIGH); P5 Batch D wire 3 imagen art keepers (offline matte->atlas->render-swap, lazy-load, no bump). Council R1 Grok-4.20-reasoning + Gemini-2.5-pro + Opus PRIME-AUDIT, HIGH confidence, no SPLIT. ADOPTED: P2 keep-the-draw discipline; P4 walk-speed ~=chewer (catchable, not undercut) + bounded acquisition radius (anti-kite); P4 two-commit split (substrate+WALK, then chase AI); P5 graceful fallback to procedural rig until atlas loads. REJECTED on audit: Grok fixed-point/client-extrapolation integrator (contradicts proven float-Verlet determinism + no-client-physics arch); Grok seed-pinned-art (offline-baked, no runtime gen). CARRY-FORWARD (logged, Gemini quality flag): proper Helga walk-cycle (Veo loop/multi-pose) once veo/imagen reference-conditioning works in this auth -- first-pass P5 static sprite slides while walking.

reflexion_entries_to_archive: S108-PLAN #verify-the-councils-confident-consensus-against-the-actual-architecture: a 3-way Council UNANIMOUSLY headlined a MANDATORY PROTOCOL_VERSION bump asserting the client predicts physics; PRIME-AUDIT refuted it against the code (SPARK client runs ZERO authoritative physics). LESSON: two models converging is NOT independent confirmation when they share a generic prior; verify confident consensus against the actual codebase before adopting.

S109-PLAN-A #host-only-field-needs-no-wire-bump-when-the-serializer-is-a-whitelist: adding Creature.poopyUntilTick needed ZERO save.ts changes because serializeCreature is a field WHITELIST. LESSON: read the serializer before assuming a new field forces a protocol bump.

S109-PLAN-A #the-unlock-hook-vocabulary-vs-the-final-gate-vocabulary: the unlock hook writes priority_state:'unlocked' but pdca-final-gate accepts only {approved,in_progress,completed}. FIX: reconcile priority_state to 'in_progress' after the hook mints unlock_source:user (the load-bearing field).
